The '''Medal of Victory'''
was a medal awarded to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] for successfully completing thirteen tours of duty. It was believed to be the highest "tours of duty" award capable of being earned by a starfighter pilot.

==History==
[[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] was awarded this medal during his career as a [[TIE pilot]], shortly before the destruction of the [[Death Star II/Legends|Second Death Star]] [[Battle of Endor/Legends|at]] [[Endor/Legends|Endor]].

He earned the medal for his [[The Emperor's Will (campaign)|role in the destruction]] of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]], who tried to flee his flagship aboard the Corvette ''[[Vorknkx]]'', unaware of the [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device's]] catastrophic instability when used in [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Design==
The ribbon had red and blue stripes, with a red cloth at the back. The medal itself was primarily gold, with a silver patch at the center. The patch had an engraving of a red dragon-like creature.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
